text_jp: 何だと！空だったのか！？{END}
text_en: What!? It was empty!?{END}

text_jp:
はい！カプセルは消えました
でも、中は空でした{END}
text_en: Yes! The capsule disappeared, but it was empty inside.{END}

text_jp:
ＢＬＡＣＫから…１９８８年からの
連絡が無い{END}
text_en: There has been no contact from BLACK… from 1988.{END}

text_jp: 一体、どうなってるんです？{END}
text_en: What is going on?{END}

text_jp: 彼の時代で何かがおこっている…{END}
text_en: Something is happening in his era…{END}

text_jp: …邪眼が実体を持ったとなると…{END}
text_en: …If Jagan has gained a physical body…{END}

text_jp: 次の狙いは創世王になる事…{END}
text_en: his next target is to become Creation King…{END}

text_jp:
まさか！　邪眼は肉体ごと時空を
移動できるのか！？{END}
text_en: No… Can Jagan move through space-time with his body!?{END}

text_jp: えっ！？そんな事って…{END}
text_en: Huh!? Is that possible…?{END}

text_jp: だとすると…彼が危ない{END}
text_en: If so… he is in danger.{END}

text_jp: 助ける方法は無いんですか！？{END}
text_en: Is there no way to save him!?{END}

text_jp: 先輩…この下の巨大な装置…あれが{END}
text_en: Senpai… that huge device below… Could it be…?{END}

text_jp: …おそらくそうだ{END}
text_en: …Most likely, yes.{END}

text_jp:
邪眼はあの装置を使って全時代の博士の
脳波をつなぎ、時空を操っている…{END}
text_en: Jagan is using that device to link Dr Tadokoro's brain waves across every era and manipulate space-time…{END}

text_jp: じゃあ、邪眼はもう過去へ…{END}
text_en: Then Jagan has already gone into the past…{END}

text_jp: １９８８年に行ったということですか？{END}
text_en: You mean he went to 1988?{END}

text_jp:
もしそうなら、我々にはもう方法が…
ない…{END}
text_en: If so, there is nothing we can do now…{END}

text_jp: …いや、ある！{END}
text_en: …No, there is!{END}

text_jp: え！？それは？{END}
text_en: Huh!? What is it?{END}

text_jp: 彼なら知っているはずだ{END}
text_en: He should know.{END}

text_jp:
邪眼の意識に触れ、時空を制御した…
田所博士…{END}
text_en: Dr Tadokoro… He touched Jagan's consciousness and controlled space-time…{END}

text_jp:
しかし！あの状態の博士と
話をする方法があるのか…{END}
text_en: But can we speak with the doctor in that state…?{END}

text_jp: それは俺に任せてくれ{END}
text_en: Leave that to me.{END}

text_jp: ライダーマン！{END}
text_en: Riderman!{END}
